title: Lightning safety - Canada.ca

The Canadian Lightning Danger Map has moved.
Visit Canada.ca/weather and turn on the Lightning layer for the new Lightning Map of current lightning strikes in Canada.

## Services and information

### Lightning safety overview
Lightning safety tips for indoors and outdoors.

### Lightning fatalities and injuries
Risks and statistics by season, days of the week, age and activity.

### Dangers of lightning
Six ways lightning can hurt you, from ground currents to blunt trauma.

### Lightning bolts from the blue
Pay attention to the warning signs.
See where lightning is happening across Canada in real-time.
